title: Add manage duplicates feature to work managment enterprise

posts.author: einavpeleg (Einav Peleg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday team,
I think its more than reasonable to request to add the ‘manage duplicates’ feature to the work management product, even if its only to the enterprise tier.
This feature is a basic tool in managing data, and makes much more sense than a CRM only feature.

The functionality already exists, so its probably just a business decision.

Can someone back me up here?

posts.author: RasmusTJ (Rasmus T. J.)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a much needed function. We would probably pay for it.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @einavpeleg @RasmusTJ,

You can manage duplicates using the Duplicates and Uniques app.
You can set up templates which will run automatically to find, merge, delete or move duplicates.
